item.title: John Dewey’s quote on learning: Why children learn best through meaningful experiences
item.summary: John Dewey championed active and meaningful education, connecting classroom learning to real life experiences. His philosophy transformed teaching methods, moving away from rote memorization towards hands-on engagement. Dewey's ideas remain relevant today, influencing modern educational practices and professional development programs. He stressed that education should prepare students for meaningful participation in society. This approach helps individuals understand and navigate life more effectively.
